stemHtml: An aircraft flying at FL 100 from Marseille (QNH 1012 hPa) to Palma de Mallorca (QNH 1006 hPa) experiences no change to true altitude. The reason for this is that…

options.a: the air over Palma de Mallorca is colder than that over Marseille
options.b: the altimeters are erroneous, and need to be tested
options.c: the air over Palma de Mallorca is warmer than that over Marseille
options.d: one of the two QNH values may be incorrect
